---
title: "Password Strength Checker"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
page-layout: article
toc: false
description: "Evaluate the strength of passwords against modern security standards"
date: "2025-03-10"
categories: [security, authentication, tools]
image: "/assets/images/cyber-security.jpg"
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Password Strength <span class="gr">Checker</span></h1>
    <p>Evaluate passwords against modern security standards. Everything runs locally in your browser.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Password Evaluation</h2>
    <p>Enter a password below to evaluate its strength. The password is processed locally and is never sent to our servers.</p>

    <div class="mb-3">
      <label for="password-input" class="form-label"><strong>Password</strong></label>
      <div class="input-group">
        <input type="password" class="form-control" id="password-input" placeholder="Enter a password">
        <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button" id="toggle-password">
          <i class="bi bi-eye"></i>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <button class="btn btn-primary" id="evaluate-button">Evaluate Password</button>

    <div class="mt-4" id="results-container" style="display: none;">
      <h4>Password Strength: <span id="strength-text">Medium</span></h4>

      <div class="progress mb-3">
        <div id="strength-meter" class="progress-bar bg-warning" role="progressbar" style="width: 65%;" aria-valuenow="65" aria-valuemin="0" aria-valuemax="100"></div>
      </div>

      <div class="row">
        <div class="col-md-6">
          <h5>Strength Analysis</h5>
          <ul class="list-group mb-3" id="strength-analysis">
            <li class="list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">Length<span class="badge bg-success rounded-pill"><i class="bi bi-check"></i></span></li>
            <li class="list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">Complexity<span class="badge bg-warning rounded-pill"><i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle"></i></span></li>
            <li class="list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">Dictionary Words<span class="badge bg-danger rounded-pill"><i class="bi bi-x"></i></span></li>
            <li class="list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">Common Patterns<span class="badge bg-success rounded-pill"><i class="bi bi-check"></i></span></li>
          </ul>
        </div>

        <div class="col-md-6">
          <h5>Password Statistics</h5>
          <ul class="list-group mb-3" id="password-stats">
            <li class="list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">Password Length<span>12 characters</span></li>
            <li class="list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">Character Types<span>3 types</span></li>
            <li class="list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">Estimated Entropy<span>48 bits</span></li>
            <li class="list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center">Crack Time Estimate<span>3 days</span></li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="alert alert-primary" id="recommendations">
        <h5><i class="bi bi-info-circle"></i> Recommendations</h5>
        <ul id="recommendation-list">
          <li>Add special characters to increase complexity</li>
          <li>Avoid using dictionary words</li>
          <li>Consider increasing password length</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Understanding Password Strength</h2>
    <p class="sub">What makes a password strong or weak.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-arrows-expand"></i><h3>Length</h3><p>&lt;8 chars: Very weak. 8-11: Weak. 12-15: Medium. 16+: Strong.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-shuffle"></i><h3>Complexity</h3><p>Mix lowercase, uppercase, numbers, and special characters for maximum strength.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-x-circle"></i><h3>Common Patterns</h3><p>Avoid keyboard patterns (qwerty), repeated characters, and sequential characters.</p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-3"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-book"></i><h3>Dictionary Words</h3><p>Common words, names, dates, and pop culture references are easily cracked.</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Creating Strong Passwords</h2>
    <p class="sub">Two proven methods for generating secure passwords.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-chat-quote"></i><h3>Passphrase Method</h3><p>Choose 4-6 random words. Combine with spaces or special characters. Add capitalization and numbers.</p><p><code>Correct Horse Battery Staple</code></p></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-dice-5"></i><h3>Random Password Method</h3><p>Generate at least 16 characters. Include all character types. Store in a password manager.</p><p><code>p7X&amp;tQ9Z$mR2vN4*</code></p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```

### Entropy and Password Strength

Entropy is a measure of password unpredictability, typically measured in bits:

- **Less than 40 bits**: Very weak
- **40-60 bits**: Weak
- **60-80 bits**: Medium
- **80-100 bits**: Strong
- **100+ bits**: Very strong

The entropy of a truly random password can be estimated as: log2(C) x L, where C is the character set size and L is the password length.

### Password Manager Recommendations

We strongly recommend using a password manager to generate and store unique, complex passwords for each service you use. Popular options include:

- Bitwarden
- 1Password
- KeePassXC
- LastPass
- Dashlane

### Security Considerations

1. **Never share your passwords**: Even with this tool, your password is processed locally in your browser
2. **Use unique passwords**: Each account should have a different password
3. **Change compromised passwords**: If your password appears in a data breach, change it immediately
4. **Enable MFA/2FA**: Add an extra layer of security with multi-factor authentication
5. **Regularly update critical passwords**: Change passwords for sensitive accounts periodically

### Additional Resources

- [NIST Digital Identity Guidelines](https://pages.nist.gov/800-63-3/sp800-63b.html)
- [OWASP Authentication Cheat Sheet](https://cheatsheetseries.owasp.org/cheatsheets/Authentication_Cheat_Sheet.html)
- [Troy Hunt's "Have I Been Pwned"](https://haveibeenpwned.com/)
- [Password Manager Reviews by Privacy Tools](https://www.privacytools.io/password-managers)
- [Electronic Frontier Foundation's Dice-Generated Passphrases](https://www.eff.org/dice)

```{=html}
<div class="m">
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Worried about password security?</h2>
    <p>We can help you implement strong authentication across your organization.</p>
    <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="m-b">Book a free consultation</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> MFA deployment &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> SSO integration &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Policy review
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  var passwordInput = document.getElementById('password-input');
  var toggleButton = document.getElementById('toggle-password');
  var evaluateButton = document.getElementById('evaluate-button');
  var resultsContainer = document.getElementById('results-container');
  var strengthText = document.getElementById('strength-text');
  var strengthMeter = document.getElementById('strength-meter');
  var strengthAnalysis = document.getElementById('strength-analysis');
  var passwordStats = document.getElementById('password-stats');
  var recommendationList = document.getElementById('recommendation-list');

  toggleButton.addEventListener('click', function() {
    if (passwordInput.type === 'password') {
      passwordInput.type = 'text';
      toggleButton.textContent = 'Hide';
    } else {
      passwordInput.type = 'password';
      toggleButton.textContent = 'Show';
    }
  });

  evaluateButton.addEventListener('click', function() {
    var password = passwordInput.value;

    if (!password) {
      alert('Please enter a password to evaluate');
      return;
    }

    var strength = 0;
    var recommendations = [];

    if (password.length < 8) {
      strength += 10;
      recommendations.push('Increase password length to at least 12 characters');
    } else if (password.length < 12) {
      strength += 25;
      recommendations.push('Consider increasing password length for better security');
    } else if (password.length < 16) {
      strength += 40;
    } else {
      strength += 50;
    }

    var hasLowercase = /[a-z]/.test(password);
    var hasUppercase = /[A-Z]/.test(password);
    var hasNumbers = /[0-9]/.test(password);
    var hasSpecial = /[^a-zA-Z0-9]/.test(password);

    var charTypes = 0;
    if (hasLowercase) charTypes++;
    if (hasUppercase) charTypes++;
    if (hasNumbers) charTypes++;
    if (hasSpecial) charTypes++;

    if (charTypes === 1) {
      strength += 5;
      recommendations.push('Add different character types (uppercase, numbers, special characters)');
    } else if (charTypes === 2) {
      strength += 15;
      recommendations.push('Add more character types for increased complexity');
    } else if (charTypes === 3) {
      strength += 25;
    } else if (charTypes === 4) {
      strength += 35;
    }

    var commonPatterns = ['123', 'abc', 'qwerty', 'password', 'admin', 'welcome'];
    var hasCommonPattern = false;

    commonPatterns.forEach(function(pattern) {
      if (password.toLowerCase().indexOf(pattern) !== -1) {
        hasCommonPattern = true;
        recommendations.push('Avoid common patterns like "' + pattern + '"');
      }
    });

    if (!hasCommonPattern) {
      strength += 15;
    }

    var strengthLevel, strengthClass;

    if (strength < 30) {
      strengthLevel = 'Very Weak';
      strengthClass = 'bg-danger';
    } else if (strength < 50) {
      strengthLevel = 'Weak';
      strengthClass = 'bg-warning';
    } else if (strength < 70) {
      strengthLevel = 'Medium';
      strengthClass = 'bg-info';
    } else if (strength < 90) {
      strengthLevel = 'Strong';
      strengthClass = 'bg-success';
    } else {
      strengthLevel = 'Very Strong';
      strengthClass = 'bg-success';
    }

    strengthText.textContent = strengthLevel;
    strengthMeter.className = 'progress-bar ' + strengthClass;
    strengthMeter.style.width = strength + '%';
    strengthMeter.setAttribute('aria-valuenow', strength);

    /* Update strength analysis using DOM methods */
    while (strengthAnalysis.firstChild) strengthAnalysis.removeChild(strengthAnalysis.firstChild);

    function addAnalysisItem(label, pass, warn) {
      var li = document.createElement('li');
      li.className = 'list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center';
      li.appendChild(document.createTextNode(label));
      var span = document.createElement('span');
      span.className = 'badge ' + (pass ? 'bg-success' : (warn ? 'bg-warning' : 'bg-danger')) + ' rounded-pill';
      var icon = document.createElement('i');
      icon.className = 'bi ' + (pass ? 'bi-check' : (warn ? 'bi-exclamation-triangle' : 'bi-x'));
      span.appendChild(icon);
      li.appendChild(span);
      strengthAnalysis.appendChild(li);
    }

    addAnalysisItem('Length', password.length >= 12, password.length >= 8);
    addAnalysisItem('Complexity', charTypes >= 3, charTypes >= 2);
    addAnalysisItem('Common Patterns', !hasCommonPattern, false);

    /* Update password statistics using DOM methods */
    while (passwordStats.firstChild) passwordStats.removeChild(passwordStats.firstChild);

    var charsetSize = 26 * (hasUppercase ? 2 : 1) * (hasNumbers ? 10 : 1) * (hasSpecial ? 33 : 1);
    var entropy = (Math.log2(Math.pow(charsetSize, password.length))).toFixed(1);

    var crackTimeEstimate;
    if (entropy < 40) {
      crackTimeEstimate = 'Minutes to hours';
    } else if (entropy < 60) {
      crackTimeEstimate = 'Hours to days';
    } else if (entropy < 80) {
      crackTimeEstimate = 'Weeks to months';
    } else if (entropy < 100) {
      crackTimeEstimate = 'Years to decades';
    } else {
      crackTimeEstimate = 'Centuries';
    }

    function addStatItem(label, value) {
      var li = document.createElement('li');
      li.className = 'list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center';
      li.appendChild(document.createTextNode(label));
      var span = document.createElement('span');
      span.textContent = value;
      li.appendChild(span);
      passwordStats.appendChild(li);
    }

    addStatItem('Password Length', password.length + ' characters');
    addStatItem('Character Types', charTypes + ' types');
    addStatItem('Estimated Entropy', entropy + ' bits');
    addStatItem('Crack Time Estimate', crackTimeEstimate);

    /* Update recommendations using DOM methods */
    while (recommendationList.firstChild) recommendationList.removeChild(recommendationList.firstChild);

    if (recommendations.length === 0) {
      recommendations.push('Your password is strong. Remember to use unique passwords for different services.');
    }

    recommendations.forEach(function(rec) {
      var li = document.createElement('li');
      li.textContent = rec;
      recommendationList.appendChild(li);
    });

    resultsContainer.style.display = 'block';
  });
});
</script>
```
